top_signals.title: Oil hits $100 for first time since May while Wall Street stocks slide
top_signals.summary: Donald Trump warns US is weighing ‘massive attack’ on Iran as Middle East tensions ratchet higher
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board requests comment on a proposal to amend its requirements for banks to maintain anti-money laundering programs
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board requests comment on a proposal to amend its requirements for banks to maintain anti-money laundering programs
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: EU fines Google €890mn in test of Trump’s threats to protect Big Tech
top_signals.summary: EU competition chief says it is bloc’s ‘duty to defend rule of law’ while delivering ‘strong message’ to search giant

top_signals.title: US, Partner Nations Conduct Live-Fire Sinking During RIMPAC 26
top_signals.summary: Ships and aircraft participating in exercise Rim of the Pacific (RIMPAC) 2026 conducted a planned, live-fire sinking exercise (SINKEX) and sank decommissioned USS Mobile Bay (CG 53), July 12, 2026, and decommissioned USS Peleliu (LHA 5), July 17.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
